calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amanda Ebey Esq., via zoom, for and with M. Sue Bell, proposed administrator, via zoom.

Ms. Ebey addressed her failure to appear stating that she thought the petition was pre-granted. The Court admonished Ms. Ebey about providing the correct hearing inforamtion in her notices going forward. Ms. Ebey responded stating that she now has the correct hearing information. Ms. Bell addressed her husband's lost will stating that his attorney no longer had the will because she was only required to keep documents for five years.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The holographic will dated October 11, 2006 is admitted to probate. M. Sue Bell is appointed as the Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt/Jackie Alameda. Deputy: Pleigo. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. After consideration by the court, and as a courtesy, this matter is continued to Jan-31-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. No Order to Appear shall be issued.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
